state.next-action: PHASE 22 SESSION 5: planning + research methodology. Session 5 does less site work and more design work: (1) updated .planning/DISCUSS-PHASE-25.md with user's confirmed answers on skill marker mechanism (hybrid file + hook-emitted event — agent writes .planning/.trace-active-skill, hook reads and attributes + emits discrete invocation events), hook handler location (framework-versioned in GAD repo, absolute path from settings.json), and 4KB output cap. (2) Added phase 27 "Structured objective data production for evaluations" to the roadmap — parallel to phase 25, covers structured human review rubric, automated playwright gate checks, derived metrics from trace events (tool_use_mix, commit_rhythm, divergence_score, plan_adherence_delta), cross-run aggregate queries via `gad eval query`, visualization patterns keyed to research questions. Full discuss-phase output in .planning/DISCUSS-PHASE-27.md with 22 seed tasks. (3) Shipped skills/objective-eval-design/SKILL.md — the research methodology skill that captures the discipline (every measurement must answer a specific research question, expose inputs, be comparable across runs, be decomposable). (4) Added Data Production Pipeline section to /methodology page showing raw→structured→derived→insight flow. (5) Pinned decisions gad-58..61: skill marker hybrid, handler location, 4KB cap, research priority on data production. NEXT SESSION: run /gad:plan-phase 27 against DISCUSS-PHASE-27.md to scope the concrete rubric + playwright + derived metrics work. Phase 25 also ready for plan-phase but phase 27 can run in parallel since the rubric and derived metrics work landing against v3 data.
